steps.title: Use a polynomial regression check
steps.content: The two expressions must agree for every $x$, so use several test inputs in Desmos. Enter $x_1=[0,1,2]$, then type $3(2x_1^2+p x_1+8)-16x_1(p+4)\sim6x_1^2-155x_1+24$. Desmos solves the unknown constant and returns $p=7$.

steps.title: Match the middle coefficient
steps.content: The target expression is $6x^2-155x+24$, so the $x$-coefficient must be $-155$: $$-13p-64=-155$$ $$-13p=-91$$ $$p=7$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: $p=7$ matches choice B. Substitution gives $6x^2+(-91-64)x+24=6x^2-155x+24$, so the expressions are equivalent.
